steps.title: Name the advantage
steps.content: The notes say ordinary platinum catalysts require a large amount of rare, expensive platinum. Zhao's catalyst was highly effective while requiring only trace amounts, so the advantage is using much less platinum without losing effectiveness.

steps.title: Reject background-only choices
steps.content:
• Choice A describes the catalyst's composition but does not explain the advantage.
  • Choice B vaguely says it requires a particular amount, missing the key comparison.
  • Choice C explains the problem with typical platinum catalysts but not the new catalyst's benefit.
The remaining choice states the advantage directly. The answer is D.
